content.fact_text: Implemented MfaController to orchestrate MFA setup, verification, and deactivation.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements HTTP transport for MFA lifecycle, delegating to MfaService for business logic. Uses Zod for input validation and Pino for structured logging. Handles errors centrally.
interfaces: setup(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
verify(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
disable(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides the HTTP interface for the MFA domain, ensuring separation of concerns between transport and business logic.
